stations.name: Closest stations are Yeronga and Coorparoo (drive)

buses.note: Bus routes serve Tarragindi via Ipswich Road and Cracknell Road.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 12 to 16 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

secondary_state.name: Holland Park State High School or Yeronga State High catchment

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Tarragindi has small village clusters along Cracknell Road. Greenslopes Mall and Stones Corner are within a short drive for additional retail and dining.
lifestyle.topography_note: Tarragindi has a clear ridge running through it with elevated streets carrying city outlooks.

pockets.name: Ridge streets
pockets.character: Elevated streets with city outlooks. Premium pocket.

pockets.name: Wellers Hill side
pockets.character: Streets bordering Wellers Hill with the Wellers Hill SS catchment overlap.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers moving from Annerley or Yeronga for the topography and the catchment.
Character home stock with renovation potential.

verify_flags: Tarragindi and Wellers Hill catchments by street
